title: Card Index
description: Spec-silent shape (the approved build plan's Phase 2 section names 'content/cards/index.json' -- regenerated by scripts/reconcile_run.py after every analyst/verifier run -- without fixing its fields; decision logged in IMPROVEMENT_BACKLOG.md). Top-level object: a version plus a flat manifest of every published card, one entry per content/cards/<id>.json, carrying only the subset of card.schema.json's fields the frontend/index needs to list and link cards (full prose/citations stay in the per-card file) -- id, date, headline, topics[], lexicon_terms[], status. status reuses card.schema.json's own enum verbatim (confirmed/reported/corrected) since this index only ever lists cards that were actually published (a verifier-dropped cluster never gets a card, so 'dropped' is not a valid value here -- that state lives in data/ledger.json instead, per schemas/ledger.schema.json).

cards.description: One entry per published card, most-recent-first by convention (not schema-enforced).
